overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r c l} \mathbf {C} _ {\tilde {x}} & = & E [ (\tilde {\mathbf {x}} - E (\tilde {\mathbf {x}})) (\tilde {\mathbf {x}} - E (\tilde {\mathbf {x}})) ^ {H} ] \\ & = & E \left\{\left[ \begin{array}{c} \tilde {x} _ {1} - E (\tilde {x} _ {1}) \\ \tilde {x} _ {2} - E (\tilde {x} _ {2}) \\ \vdots \\ \tilde {x} _ {n} - E (\tilde {x} _ {n}) \end{array} \right] \left[ \begin{array}{l l l l} \tilde {x} _ {1} ^ {*} - E ^ {*} (\tilde {x} _ {1}) & \tilde {x} _ {2} ^ {*} - E ^ {*} (\tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \tilde {x} _ {n} ^ {*} - E ^ {*} (\tilde {x} _ {n}) \end{array} \right] \right\} \\ & = & \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c} \operatorname{var} (\tilde {x} _ {1}) & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {1}, \tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {1}, \tilde {x} _ {n}) \\ \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {2}, \tilde {x} _ {1}) & \operatorname{var} (\tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {2}, \tilde {x} _ {n}) \\ \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\ \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {n}, \tilde {x} _ {1}) & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {n}, \tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \operatorname{var} (\tilde {x} _ {n}) \end{array} \right] ^ {*} \end{array} \tag {15.1}\tag{15.13}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r c l} \mathbf {C} _ {\tilde {x}} & = & E [ (\tilde {\mathbf {x}} - E (\tilde {\mathbf {x}})) (\tilde {\mathbf {x}} - E (\tilde {\mathbf {x}})) ^ {H} ] \\ & = & E \left\{\left[ \begin{array}{c} \tilde {x} _ {1} - E (\tilde {x} _ {1}) \\ \tilde {x} _ {2} - E (\tilde {x} _ {2}) \\ \vdots \\ \tilde {x} _ {n} - E (\tilde {x} _ {n}) \end{array} \right] \left[ \begin{array}{l l l l} \tilde {x} _ {1} ^ {*} - E ^ {*} (\tilde {x} _ {1}) & \tilde {x} _ {2} ^ {*} - E ^ {*} (\tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \tilde {x} _ {n} ^ {*} - E ^ {*} (\tilde {x} _ {n}) \end{array} \right] \right\} \\ & = & \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c} \operatorname{var} (\tilde {x} _ {1}) & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {1}, \tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {1}, \tilde {x} _ {n}) \\ \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {2}, \tilde {x} _ {1}) & \operatorname{var} (\tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {2}, \tilde {x} _ {n}) \\ \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\ \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {n}, \tilde {x} _ {1}) & \operatorname{cov} (\tilde {x} _ {n}, \tilde {x} _ {2}) & \dots & \operatorname{var} (\tilde {x} _ {n}) \end{array} \right] ^ {*} \end{array} \tag {15.1}
